rationale.fidelity: Precisely keeps binary assortment membership as the pre-demand control, customer starting states and paths as uncertainty, category capacity on selected products, purchase or exit as outcomes, and expected assortment revenue as the objective.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly identifies the retailer, timing, capacity-feasible choice, scarce-capacity stakes, Markov substitution mechanism, breadth-versus-revenue tension, and bounded alternative assortments.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Appropriately treats scholarly novelty as provisional because no literature is supplied and makes no unsupported contribution claim.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Labels the transition interpretation as a model assumption, rejects path steering and guaranteed revenue improvement, states calibration counterconditions, and identifies missing units and validation.
rationale.prose_clarity: Substantively clear and accurate, though the mode/readiness preamble, gate checklist, and repeated boundary language are more procedural than necessary.
rationale.overall: A fully faithful and well-bounded Markov-chain assortment framing with only minor presentational overhead.
